# Black Blood

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Rarity | Unknown |
| Class | Any |

## Description

Black Blood is the Starter Upgrade of the Ironclad's Burning Blood. Its HP gain is doubled to 12, from 6.

## Notes

### Sources

At the start of Act 2, can be obtained by taking Touch of Orobas from Orobas. Replaces Burning Blood.

## Update History

- **Early Access v0.98**
    - Added Black Blood to the game.
